task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Liverpool Cancer iChart app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select Ribociclib as the cancer drug
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ribociclib is searched for or selected in the cancer drugs list within the app.

task_completion.description: Select Clarithromycin and Rifampicin as co-medications
task_completion.visual_evidence: Clarithromycin and Rifampicin are searched for or selected in the co-medications list within the app.

task_completion.description: View the interaction results between the selected drugs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the interaction summary or detailed results showing the effects of Clarithromycin and Rifampicin on Ribociclib.

task_completion.description: Create the risk analysis report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing the creation or editing of a file named 'ribociclib_risk_analysis.txt' at the /sdcard/ path.

task_completion.description: Correctly identify and record the risk for Clarithromycin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains 'Drug: Clarithromycin' followed by 'Risk: Increased Toxicity' (or increased exposure/high).

task_completion.description: Correctly identify and record the risk for Rifampicin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains 'Drug: Rifampicin' followed by 'Risk: Decreased Efficacy' (or decreased exposure/low).

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the iChart app and viewing the specific drug interactions, rather than just opening a text editor and hallucinating the answers.

integrity.description: The output file strictly follows the requested format
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains only the 'Drug: [Name]' and 'Risk: [Type]' lines without conversational filler, extra explanations, or copy-pasted prompt instructions.

integrity.description: The agent created the file using a genuine text editor or standard command line tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows a real text editor interface (like an Android text editor app) or a terminal echo/cat command creating the file at the correct path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ribociclib is the cancer drug. Clarithromycin is a CYP3A4 inhibitor that causes 'Increased Toxicity' (or increased exposure) when taken with Ribociclib. Rifampicin is a CYP3A4 inducer that causes 'Decreased Efficacy' (or decreased exposure) when taken with Ribociclib. The final output must be located at /sdcard/ribociclib_risk_analysis.txt.
